metadata.description: HqO Plugin Marketplace — official Claude Cowork & Code plugins for the HqO team.

plugins.name: cowork-memory
plugins.description: Automatically saves completed Cowork sessions to local memory. Triggered by global instruction after every completed task list.

plugins.name: cowork-email-digest
plugins.description: Digests the last 24 hours of Gmail into the cowork memory system. Requires cowork-memory.

plugins.name: cowork-slack-digest
plugins.description: Digests the last 24 hours of Slack DMs and channels into the cowork memory system. Requires cowork-memory.

plugins.name: cowork-gemini-notes
plugins.description: Digests the last 24 hours of Google Gemini meeting notes into the cowork memory system. Requires cowork-memory.

plugins.name: personal-progress-tracker
plugins.description: Onboarding and recall for the cowork memory system. Verifies connectors, sets up global instructions, configures Slack channels, schedules digests, and provides open-ended memory search.
